---
description: Phase 4 implementation. Autonomously consume tasks with /loop. Each task's condition to advance is green tests.
agent: agent
---

Read the file `.agentloop/prompts/commands/build.md` and execute that procedure exactly. Capability terms (`structured-question`, `notify-and-wait`, `approval-presentation`, `session-compaction`, `role-delegation`, `autonomous-build-iteration`) resolve per the capability mapping in `.github/instructions/agentloop.instructions.md`.
